subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that in my love for Thee I have not sought any rest, that in proclaiming Thy Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی انت تعلم بانی مااردت لنفسی راحه فی حبک و لا سکونا فی امرک و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
